items.name: 認証 (email+pwd / MFA / OAuth)
happy_path: email/password ログイン
MFA TOTP 検証
OAuth (Anthropic/GitHub/Slack/Google) 認証
session 30 days
error_paths: invalid credentials → 401 (generic)
rate limit → 429
MFA fail → 401
OAuth state mismatch → 401
items.policies: session 30 days / MFA optional / OAuth state token / rate limit per IP

outputs_4xx.422: email format invalid or password too short
outputs_4xx.429: rate limit exceeded (5 failed attempts in 15 min)

outputs_4xx.401: OAuth state mismatch or code expired

ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When valid email/password is submitted to POST /api/auth/login, the system shall return 200 with access_token + refresh_token + user_id.
UNWANTED: If invalid credentials are submitted to POST /api/auth/login, the system shall return 401 with a generic message (no user enumeration).
STATE-DRIVEN: While MFA is enabled for the user, the system shall require POST /api/auth/mfa/verify with a valid TOTP code before issuing access_token.
UNWANTED: If 5 failed login attempts occur within 15 min from the same IP, the system shall return 429 with retry_after_sec=900.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When OAuth callback GET /api/auth/oauth/{provider}/callback is invoked with a valid state token, the system shall complete the OAuth handshake and return access_token + refresh_token.
UNWANTED: If OAuth state token does not match the originating session, the system shall return 401 and reject the callback.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/auth/password-reset is called with an email, the system shall always return 2xx (no account enumeration) and send reset email only if the account exists.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: 既存 96 スキル整理 / archive 管理
happy_path: 管理画面でラベル付け
archive 対象を _archived/
active のみ AI 召喚に表示
skill_md 編集とテスト実行
error_paths: import 経路が壊れる→依存解析で先に修正
test 実行 fail → retry
items.policies: archive は soft delete / physical delete 禁止 / skill_md は account 単位編集可
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/skills is called with category=ai, the system shall return all non-archived skills matching that category.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/skills/{id}/archive is called by an account_owner, the system shall set archived_at and exclude the skill from AI invocation lists.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/skills is called by a non-owner role, the system shall return 403.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/skills/{id}/test is invoked more than 10 times per minute per user, the system shall return 429.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a skill is archived, the system shall not include it in AI employee invocation candidates.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: AI 社員ハイブリッド統合 (BMAD + Agent Teams + 既存)
happy_path: 召喚→スキル context 注入→BMAD ペルソナ選択→parent 継承→LLM 抽象化呼び出し→artifact + AC 検証
error_paths: context 上限→段階読込
LLM error→retry + provider fallback
ハルシネーション疑い→F-011 壁打ち
items.policies: skill_md は internal-only / hierarchy 循環禁止 / clone は opt-in 必須
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/ai-employees/org-chart is called, the system shall return a hierarchical tree of all non-archived employees in the workspace.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/ai-employees is called with a valid persona definition, the system shall create the employee with hierarchy_level enforced (level 1-3).
UNWANTED: If POST /api/ai-employees would create a circular parent reference, the system shall return 409.
STATE-DRIVEN: While clone opt-in is FALSE for the source user, the system shall return 403 for POST /api/ai-employees/{id}/clone-from-user.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/ai-employees/{id}/test is called more than 20 times per minute per workspace, the system shall return 429.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: account / workspace / members 階層管理
happy_path: account 作成→owner 付与→workspace 作成→admin 自動付与→members 招待
error_paths: owner 削除→移譲先必須
ws 数上限→アップグレード誘導
last admin strip → 409
items.policies: soft_delete / max_workspaces_per_account_by_plan / last admin strip block
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When PUT /api/accounts/{id} is called by the owner with a valid plan upgrade, the system shall update plan and emit account_updated audit log.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/accounts/{id}/transfer-owner is called for a user who is not an account member, the system shall return 409.
UNWANTED: If DELETE /api/workspaces/{id}/members/{user_id} would leave the workspace with zero admin, the system shall return 409.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/accounts/{id}/invitations is called more than 20 times per hour for the same account, the system shall return 429.
STATE-DRIVEN: While an account has reached the workspace cap of its plan, the system shall return 409 for POST /api/workspaces.
UNWANTED: If GET /api/invitations/{token} resolves a token past its expires_at, the system shall return 409 expired.

items.name: ヒアリング → 仕様書 HTML パイプライン
happy_path: hearing 4STEP → requirements 6STEP → functional-breakdown → mock 自動生成 → Storage upload → 共有リンク
error_paths: 対話中断→slot_state 永続化で再開
曖昧発言→複数解釈提示
items.policies: HTML + Markdown hybrid / Tailwind CDN / print support
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When a client connects to WS /ws/hearing/{session_id}, the system shall stream chat messages and slot_state updates for that session.
UNWANTED: If WS /ws/hearing/{session_id} receives a session_id that does not belong to the caller's workspace, the system shall close the connection with 403.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/hearing/save is called, the system shall persist slot_state with a monotonically increasing version.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a hearing session is in 'paused' state, the system shall accept POST /api/workspaces/{id}/hearing/save to resume from last checkpoint.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/workspaces/{id}/specs/{spec_id}/comments body exceeds 10000 chars, the system shall return 422.

items.name: 画面モック自動生成パイプライン (M-5b)
happy_path: screens.json 取得→デザイントークン読込→ui-mockup HTML 生成→コンポーネントカタログ参照→Storage upload→画面遷移マップ SVG 生成
error_paths: デザイントークン未確定→default theme + 警告
大規模画面→セクション分割
items.policies: max_size_per_screen_mb 1 / responsive_threshold md+ / Lucide Icons only
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/workspaces/{id}/mocks/{screen_id}/html is called, the system shall return the latest version of the mock HTML.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When PUT /api/workspaces/{id}/mocks/{screen_id}/html is called with a new HTML body, the system shall increment the version and persist a snapshot.
UNWANTED: If PUT /api/workspaces/{id}/mocks/{screen_id}/html receives html body > 1MB, the system shall return 422.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/workspaces/{id}/mocks/{screen_id}/ai-edit is called more than 30 times per minute per workspace, the system shall return 429.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a mock is locked for editing by another user, the system shall return 409 for PUT /api/workspaces/{id}/mocks/{screen_id}/html.

items.name: 機能・タスク分解 + acceptance-criteria (EARS)
happy_path: functional-breakdown→feature-decomposition→task-decomposition→各タスクに EARS AC 自動生成→DAG 登録
error_paths: 分解過大→impact-analysis 警告
AC 曖昧→EARS 書き直し promotion
items.policies: acceptance_count_per_task 3-10 推奨 / task_independence_kpi >=90%
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When PUT /api/workspaces/{id}/requirements is called with EARS-conformant items, the system shall persist them and return version+1.
UNWANTED: If PUT /api/workspaces/{id}/requirements is called with items that fail EARS form validation, the system shall return 422 with offending item indices.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/requirements/versions is called, the system shall snapshot the current requirements and return a new version_id.
UNWANTED: If PUT /api/tasks/{id} version mismatches the server version, the system shall return 409 conflict.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a task's status is 'done', the system shall return 422 for PUT /api/tasks/{id} status changes back to 'in_progress'.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: 多 view タスク管理 (Kanban / List / DAG)
happy_path: view 切替→検索/フィルタ→drag&drop 状態変更→一括操作
error_paths: 大量タスク描画遅延→仮想スクロール
max_parallel 超過 → 409
items.policies: max_comfortable_tasks 1000 / kanban_columns 機能別アコーディオン (Todo/In Progress/Review/Done)
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/workspaces/{id}/tasks?group_by=feature is called, the system shall return tasks grouped by feature_id with accordion-friendly metadata.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/tasks/bulk-play is called with a list of task_ids, the system shall spawn sessions in dependency order.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/tasks/{id}/play is called for a task with unsatisfied dependencies, the system shall return 409.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/workspaces/{id}/tasks/bulk-play exceeds max_parallel_per_ws_default, the system shall queue overflow and return 200 with queued count.
STATE-DRIVEN: While the workspace has reached max_parallel sessions, the system shall return 409 for additional /play requests.

items.name: プロジェクト・フェーズ管理基盤
happy_path: 案件作成→Phase 1 default→新規 Phase 追加→タスク割当→ゲート条件定義→ゲート達成で次 Phase auto unlock
error_paths: ゲート循環→DB 制約
phase 削除→タスク移動要求
items.policies: max_phases_per_workspace 10
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/phases/{phase_id}/gate is called and all gate_conditions evaluate true, the system shall unlock the next phase.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/workspaces/{id}/phases/{phase_id}/gate is called and gate_conditions are not met, the system shall return 409 with failing conditions listed.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/workspaces/{id}/phases would create more than 10 phases for the workspace, the system shall return 409.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a phase is the current phase, the system shall not allow deletion (return 409).

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: 依存グラフ + 影響範囲伝搬
happy_path: タスク追加時に依存選択→DAG 可視化→編集時に AI が影響範囲ハイライト→PM 判断で更新/skip
error_paths: 循環依存→trigger で block
大規模 DAG→階層折りたたみ
items.policies: cycle prevention via DB trigger / impact-analysis blast_radius cap 100
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/dependencies is called with a valid edge, the system shall persist it and return 200.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/workspaces/{id}/dependencies would create a cycle in the task DAG, the system shall return 409 with cycle path included.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/dependencies/impact-analysis is called for a task, the system shall return all downstream affected tasks within blast_radius.
STATE-DRIVEN: While the workspace has more than 1000 tasks, the system shall fold DAG output into hierarchical groups (cluster_id).

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: Claude Code セッション・スポナー & swarm マネージャ
happy_path: ▶︎ click→backend POST /sessions/spawn→OAuth で claude-agent-sdk 起動→初期プロンプト構築→Plan/Gen/Eval→WebSocket stream→user_interaction_log 記録
error_paths: OAuth 期限切れ→再認証導線
30 分応答なし→crashed→4 択 (resume / 再実行 / cancel / manual fix)
連続失敗 N 回→circuit breaker
items.policies: max_parallel_per_ws_default 5 / circuit_breaker_threshold 3 / session_timeout_min 30 / resume_supported true / startup_to_first_output_sec 10
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/sessions/{id}/pause is called for a running session, the system shall save a checkpoint and transition status to 'paused' within 5 seconds.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/sessions/{id}/resume is called for a session that is not in paused or crashed state, the system shall return 409.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When a client subscribes to WS /ws/sessions/{id}/log, the system shall stream log lines with latency_target_ms <= 100 (median <= 50).
STATE-DRIVEN: While a session is in 'crashed' status, the system shall offer 4 recovery options: resume / rerun / cancel / manual_fix.
UNWANTED: If circuit_breaker_threshold (3 consecutive fails) is reached, the system shall not auto-spawn new sessions for that workspace until manual reset.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/sessions/{id}/rollback is called by workspace_admin, the system shall restore the session state to the given checkpoint and emit audit log.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: 赤線リスト + 自動停止 (5 項目)
happy_path: AI action 前にミドルウェアで pattern 検出→該当時 block + slack push + audit log + 承認待ち
error_paths: false positive→「これは安全」マークで学習
items.policies: default_categories api_key_leak / db_destructive / force_push / infinite_loop / deploy_decision
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall evaluate every AI-initiated action against active red_line patterns before execution.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When an action matches a red_line with action='block', the system shall halt execution and create a pending violation record.
UNWANTED: If a violation is in 'pending' state, the system shall not allow the originating AI session to continue without admin approval.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/violations/{id}/approve is called by a workspace_admin, the system shall resume the originating session.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/violations/{id}/approve is called for an already-resolved violation, the system shall return 409.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: GitHub 連携 (PR + HTML diff 注釈) / 顧客レビュー
happy_path: task 完了→Claude Code が commit + push→Build-Factory が PR 自動作成→HTML レビュー資料 PR コメント添付→merge で task done / 顧客は 公開トークン経由でレビュー
error_paths: merge conflict→AI 自動解決試行→失敗で人間エスカ
branch protection→警告 + 別ブランチ
items.policies: force_push は red line / 公開トークンは expires_at 必須 / merge_method 選択可
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/prs/{id}/merge is called by a workspace_admin with valid merge_method, the system shall merge the PR via GitHub API and emit pr_merged audit log.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/prs/{id}/merge is called for a PR with unresolved conflicts, the system shall return 409.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/delivery/send-client is called, the system shall generate a public token with expires_at and email the client.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a client token has expired, the system shall return 409 for GET /api/client/workspaces/{token}.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/client/comments exceeds 20 requests per hour per token, the system shall return 429.
UBIQUITOUS: The system shall record every PR review HTML attached as artifact for audit retention 7 years.

items.name: Obsidian ナレッジ母艦 (単方向 export)
happy_path: ws settings で vault パス指定→trigger 選択→artifact MD 化→frontmatter + 構造化フォルダ書込
error_paths: パス権限なし→警告 + 別パス提案
items.policies: max_per_export 100 / supabase_storage backend
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/workspaces/{id}/knowledge/search is called with q, the system shall combine pgvector + pg_trgm + FTS and return top 50 hits.
UNWANTED: If the search query q exceeds 500 chars, the system shall return 422.
STATE-DRIVEN: While obsidian export trigger is 'realtime', the system shall write artifact MD within 5 seconds of artifact creation.
UBIQUITOUS: The system shall apply RLS so members only see knowledge from workspaces they belong to.

items.name: Langfuse self-host (観測 + コスト)
happy_path: 全 LLM 呼出を Langfuse SDK で trace→ws_id/user_id/cost/tokens tag→workspace 集計→cost dashboard 表示→上限近接で warn
error_paths: Langfuse 接続失敗→ローカル buffer + 復旧時 flush
items.policies: self-host docker compose / cost cap warn at 80% of monthly limit
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/observability/cost-summary is called with date range, the system shall return total_usd + by_provider + by_user breakdown.
STATE-DRIVEN: While monthly cost reaches 80% of the workspace limit, the system shall emit cost_limit_warning notification.
UNWANTED: If monthly cost exceeds the workspace limit, the system shall block new LLM invocations and return 429 with budget_exceeded code.
UBIQUITOUS: The system shall record every LLM invocation with tokens_used + cost_usd + provider tags within 1 second of completion.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: 監査ログ + 通知 + バックアップ
happy_path: 主要 action を audit_logs trigger で INSERT→検索/export 可→DB 日次/Storage 週次/Obsidian リアルタイム自動 backup / 通知 inbox に push
error_paths: バックアップ失敗→admin 通知 + retry
items.policies: retention_audit_years 7 / retention_backup_days 90 / partition_strategy pg_partman monthly (P2)
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall write an audit_log entry for every state-mutating API call within 1 second.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/audit-logs/export.csv is called with a date range >90 days, the system shall return 422 with filter_too_broad.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a notification is unread, the system shall include it in the unread_count of GET /api/notifications.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/notifications/read-all is called with no category filter, the system shall mark all unread notifications for the user as read.
UNWANTED: If a backup job fails 3 times consecutively, the system shall alert admins via Slack and email.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: 既存 bootstrap 振り分け実行
happy_path: 振り分け表に従い 1 ファイルずつ処理→archive→_archived/→modify はチケット化→動作確認
error_paths: import 経路破綻→依存解析で先に修正
items.policies: physical_delete false / dispositon ticket per file
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall not physically delete files from the legacy bootstrap; archival is the only allowed disposition.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When a bootstrap file is dispositioned, the system shall record bootstrap_disposition audit log with target_path and action.

items.name: LLM プロバイダー抽象化 (LiteLLM)
happy_path: ws/user 単位で provider+model 設定→request 時に adapter 選択→capability flag で機能差処理→統一 response→cost/tokens を Langfuse 転送
error_paths: provider error→統一エラー型変換
機能未対応→警告 + 別 provider 提案
items.policies: LiteLLM self-host docker / 新 provider = adapter 1 ファイル / fallback chain per ADR-012
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall route all LLM calls through the provider abstraction layer; direct provider SDK use is forbidden in the main runner.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the primary provider returns 5xx, the system shall fall back to the configured secondary per ADR-012 precedence.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a workspace has BYOK key configured, the system shall use the BYOK key over the platform default.
UNWANTED: If a workspace selects a provider lacking the required capability flag (e.g., vision), the system shall return 422 with capability_unsupported.

items.name: ロール custom_permissions UI + monitor ロール
happy_path: UI でロール選択→default プリチェック→個別 override→保存→RLS / API ガード で OR 評価
error_paths: self-strip→他 admin 居なければ block / 居れば警告 modal
owner strip→絶対 block
矛盾組合せ→自動補完 option
items.policies: role_relationship completely_parallel / self_strip_block_threshold no_other_admin
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall evaluate access via OR across role default_permissions and member custom_permissions.
UNWANTED: If PUT /api/workspaces/{id}/members/{user_id}/role would leave the workspace without any admin, the system shall return 409.
UNWANTED: If a user attempts to strip the workspace owner of owner role, the system shall return 403.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a member has the 'monitor' role, the system shall grant read-only access to all workspace artifacts but deny write operations.

items.name: AI 社員 3 階層対応 + 個人ナレッジ namespace + クローン opt-in
happy_path: AI 社員に hierarchy/parent/department/cloned_from_user_id 列追加→組織図 UI→ユーザ action を user_interaction_log 記録 (opt-in TRUE 時のみ trigger 経由)
error_paths: 階層循環→DB 制約
opt-in OFF で INSERT 試行→trigger で reject
items.policies: clone_opt_in_default false / clone_data_deletion always available
ears_ac_seed: STATE-DRIVEN: While clone_opt_in is FALSE for a user, the system shall not INSERT into user_interaction_log for that user (DB trigger enforced).
EVENT-DRIVEN: When a user opts out of cloning, the system shall offer immediate deletion of user_knowledge_namespace + user_interaction_log.
UNWANTED: If creating an AI employee would create a circular hierarchy, the system shall return 409.

items.name: アカウント設定 / プロフィール画面
happy_path: プロフィール編集→user table 更新→通知設定→user_settings→API キー登録→pgsodium 暗号化保管→OAuth 連携
error_paths: 無効 API キー→検証 endpoint で事前確認
OAuth 失敗→retry 導線
items.policies: key_display masked even for admin
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/me/api-keys is called, the system shall encrypt the key plaintext with pgsodium before persisting.
UBIQUITOUS: The system shall mask API keys in all API responses (only last 4 chars visible).
UNWANTED: If POST /api/me/api-keys is called for a provider where a key already exists, the system shall return 409.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When DELETE /api/me/oauth/{provider} is called, the system shall revoke the OAuth token at the provider and unlink locally.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: グローバル検索 (Cmd+K) + アカウントダッシュボード
happy_path: Cmd+K で modal→query→Postgres FTS + pgvector + pg_trgm→カテゴリ別→RLS で見える範囲のみ→ジャンプ
error_paths: query 過大→error
結果 0→spell suggest
items.policies: max_results_per_query 50 / trigger Cmd+K / Ctrl+K
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/search is called with a non-empty q, the system shall return hits ranked by combined FTS + vector similarity score.
UBIQUITOUS: The system shall apply RLS so search hits include only resources visible to the caller.
UNWANTED: If GET /api/search receives q > 500 chars or empty, the system shall return 422.
UNWANTED: If GET /api/search exceeds 60 requests per minute per user, the system shall return 429.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/accounts/{id}/dashboard is called, the system shall aggregate KPI across all workspaces the caller belongs to within the account.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: EARS notation 標準 (acceptance-criteria)
happy_path: PM テキスト入力→AI 形式分類 (5 種)→不適合は書き直し suggest→JSON Schema 検証
error_paths: 曖昧→複数解釈提示モード
items.policies: types ubiquitous/event/state/optional/unwanted / count_per_task_recommended 3-10
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall validate every acceptance_criteria item against one of the 5 EARS forms before persisting.
UNWANTED: If an acceptance_criteria item does not match any EARS form, the system shall return 422 with the form_violation reason.

items.name: Constitution (プロジェクト不変原則)
happy_path: ws 作成時 template 生成→admin 編集→version 採番→全 AI session の初期 prompt に注入→違反は赤線エスカ→改訂時は session ごとに version snapshot
error_paths: 旧 session が旧版参照→version_at_start で動作中継続
constitution 過大→content_md 上限 10KB warn
items.policies: max_size_kb 10 / version_lock session.constitution_version_at_start で記録
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/constitution/versions is called, the system shall create a new version snapshot without affecting the active version.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/constitution/versions/{v}/approve is called, the system shall mark v as active and inject it into newly spawned sessions.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/workspaces/{id}/constitution/versions content_md exceeds 10KB, the system shall return 422.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a session was spawned with constitution_version_at_start=N, the system shall continue using version N for that session even if a newer version is approved.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応
Group B-1 (Vertical Slice / Backend) で対応

items.name: オンボーディング flow (welcome / setup / AI intro)
happy_path: welcome_first_login→workspace_setup_wizard→ai_employee_intro→ダッシュボードへ完了
error_paths: 途中離脱→onboarding_state 永続化で再開可
wizard skip→必須 step は skip 不可
items.policies: first_login 検出 / onboarding_completed_at 列
ears_ac_seed: STATE-DRIVEN: While a user's onboarding is not yet completed, the system shall redirect them to the welcome screen on every login.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/me/onboarding/advance is called with a valid step transition, the system shall persist progress and return the next_step.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/me/onboarding/skip is called for a step marked required=true, the system shall return 409.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When onboarding is completed, the system shall set onboarding_completed_at and emit onboarding_completed audit log.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: task-decomposition Group B-1 で新規実装
task-decomposition Group B-1 で新規実装
task-decomposition Group B-1 で新規実装

items.name: メール配信 (signup verify / password reset / invitation / task notif / weekly summary)
happy_path: イベント trigger→template rendering (locale aware)→provider (Resend/SES) 送信→delivery 状態 tracking
error_paths: bounce→retry 3 回 + admin 通知
rate limit by provider→queue
items.policies: provider abstraction / template versioning / unsubscribe per category
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When a workspace invitation is created, the system shall send the email_invitation template within 60 seconds.
UNWANTED: If an email bounces, the system shall retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff before alerting admins.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a user is unsubscribed from category=task_notification, the system shall not send task notification emails to them.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/email/test-send is called more than 10 times per hour per workspace, the system shall return 429.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: task-decomposition Group B-1 で新規実装 + Resend/SES integration
task-decomposition Group B-1 で新規実装

items.name: デザインシステム / コンポーネントカタログ
happy_path: design tokens 読込→Lucide Icons / shadcn/ui コンポーネント一覧→ENGINE BASE green 確認→使用箇所追跡
error_paths: 未使用コンポーネント→archive 候補
絵文字検出→警告
items.policies: Lucide Icons only / primary color #1a6648 / Noto Sans JP + JetBrains Mono
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall reject any component definition that references emoji characters (Lucide Icons only policy).
EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/design-system/icons is called, the system shall return the curated Lucide Icons subset available for mocks.
UNWANTED: If a design-token change would alter the primary color away from #1a6648, the system shall require account_owner approval.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Component catalog API: B-1 で新規実装 (low priority)

items.name: API トークン管理 / extras
happy_path: API トークン発行→scope 選択→使用例コピー→失効まで利用
error_paths: scope 超過→403
失効後利用→401
items.policies: token は pgsodium 暗号化 / scope per token / expires_at 必須
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/me/api-tokens is called, the system shall return the plaintext token exactly once and store only the hashed form.
UNWANTED: If GET /api/me/api-tokens response would expose the plaintext token, the system shall return only the masked form (last 4 chars).
STATE-DRIVEN: While an API token has expired (expires_at < now), the system shall return 401 for any request using it.
UNWANTED: If a user already has 10 active API tokens, the system shall return 429 for POST /api/me/api-tokens.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: B-1 で新規実装、pgsodium 暗号化必須

items.name: Export pipeline (spec PDF / delivery report)
happy_path: export type 選択 (spec_pdf | delivery_report)→artifact aggregate→HTML→PDF (Chromium)→Storage upload→共有リンク
error_paths: PDF レンダリング fail → retry
アーティファクト不足→警告
items.policies: PDF rendering via headless Chromium / 共有リンクは expires_at 7d
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/exports is called with type=spec_pdf, the system shall queue a PDF generation job and return export_id within 1 second.
STATE-DRIVEN: While an export status is 'queued' or 'running', the system shall return download_url=null in GET /api/exports/{id}.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/workspaces/{id}/exports is called more than 10 times per hour per workspace, the system shall return 429.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When a download_url is generated, the system shall set expires_at = now + 7 days.

legacy_drift_notes.recommendation: Headless Chromium PDF rendering pipeline、B-1 で新規実装

items.name: 共通ダイアログパターン (confirm_delete / unsaved_changes / mfa_challenge / session_expired / danger_zone)
happy_path: 危険な操作直前にダイアログ表示→ユーザ確認→操作実行 or キャンセル
error_paths: session_expired 状態で操作→401 自動 modal→再ログイン誘導
unsaved_changes→navigation 防止
items.policies: destructive actions は二段確認必須 / typed-confirmation for delete account
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall require typed-name confirmation for any DELETE on Account or Workspace via UI.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When a session expires while the user is mid-form, the system shall show the session_expired dialog and preserve form data in localStorage.
UNWANTED: If a navigation away from a dirty form is attempted, the system shall show the unsaved_changes dialog blocking navigation until confirmed.

items.name: MCP サーバー (データ流通)
happy_path: Claude Code/Desktop/Slack から MCP 接続→tool 呼出→FastAPI 応答
error_paths: auth 失敗→401
RLS 違反→403
timeout→504
items.policies: timeout_sec 30 / streaming supported / token scoped per workspace
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/mcp/tokens is called by a workspace_admin, the system shall issue a token scoped to the workspace with the requested scopes.
UNWANTED: If an MCP tool call exceeds scope, the system shall return 403.
STATE-DRIVEN: While an MCP token is expired, the system shall return 401 for any tool invocation using it.
UNWANTED: If an MCP tool call exceeds 30 seconds runtime, the system shall return 504 and emit timeout audit log.

items.name: リーダー AI 壁打ちループ (Plan/Gen/Eval)
happy_path: Evaluator PASS→leader AI 評価 (粒度/依存/コードスタイル/Constitution 遵守)→FAIL なら修正指示→max 3 ターン→3 ターン経過で人間エスカ
error_paths: 壁打ち継続無限→3 ターンで強制エスカ
全体統合矛盾→該当タスク Failed 巻き戻し
items.policies: max_review_turns 3 / escalation_channels slack_dm + ui_badge
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall not exceed max_review_turns=3 in any single PR review session.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When the 3rd review turn finishes without PASS, the system shall set status='escalated' and notify workspace_admin via Slack + ui_badge.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a PR review is 'in_progress', the system shall return 409 for additional POST /api/pr-review/start on the same PR.
UNWANTED: If a leader_persona is not registered as a workspace AI employee, the system shall return 422.

items.name: Slack 通知 (片方向)
happy_path: イベント発生→該当 channel に push→ダイジェスト朝 push (option)
error_paths: webhook 失効→再連携導線 + email fallback
items.policies: max_per_hour_default 100 / categories red_line/pr/progress/invite/system
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When a red_line violation occurs, the system shall push a Slack notification to all webhooks configured with category='red_line' within 5 seconds.
UNWANTED: If a Slack push exceeds 100 per hour per workspace, the system shall queue overflow and emit a rate_limit warning.
STATE-DRIVEN: While a Slack webhook URL returns 4xx 3 times in a row, the system shall mark it as 'broken' and fallback to email.
UBIQUITOUS: The system shall be one-way only (no Slack → BF inbound) for Phase 1.

items.name: HTML レポート全種 (7 種)
happy_path: 種別選択→artifact 埋込→SVG 図解自動生成→Storage upload→共有リンク
error_paths: 大規模アセット → split rendering
Storage upload fail → retry
items.policies: common_css Tailwind CDN / print true / responsive md+ (P3 で full mobile)
ears_ac_seed: EVENT-DRIVEN: When POST /api/workspaces/{id}/reports is called with type=delivery_report, the system shall queue a report job and return report_id.
UNWANTED: If POST /api/workspaces/{id}/reports type is not one of the 7 defined types, the system shall return 422.
UBIQUITOUS: The system shall include Tailwind CDN + print stylesheet in every generated HTML report.

items.name: システムページ (404 / 500 / 403 / maintenance)
happy_path: 不在 path→404 / 内部 error→500 / 権限不足→403 / メンテ→503 with maintenance page
error_paths: 500 中で Sentry 通知 / maintenance 解除タイマー
items.policies: 500 ページに本番 stack trace は出さない / maintenance は header X-BF-Maintenance で検出
ears_ac_seed: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall never expose internal stack traces in production 500 responses.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When GET /api/system/health returns status=maintenance, the frontend shall display the maintenance page (S-047).
STATE-DRIVEN: While maintenance mode is enabled, the system shall return 503 for all non-health endpoints.
